addValidator(address).details: Bridge is automatically enabled when minimum validators reached.

claimWithdrawal(bytes20,address,uint256,.details: Requires 2/3+ validator signatures (BFT threshold).      Message hash is computed internally to prevent forgery.      Bridge must be enabled (minimum validators set).

params.signatures: Concatenated signatures (65 bytes each: r, s, v)

deposit(bytes20,uint256).details: Validators will sign attestation on native chain.      Bridge must be enabled (minimum validators set).

emergencyWithdrawERC20(address,address,u.details: Should be gated by timelock/multisig in production.      Only for tokens OTHER than the managed UDAG token.      Uses SafeERC20 for compatibility with non-standard tokens (e.g., USDT).

getMessageHash(bytes20,address,uint256,u.details: Validators must sign the returned hash using eth_sign (EIP-191),      which automatically adds "\x19Ethereum Signed Message:\n32" prefix.

migrateToNewBridge(address,uint256).details: Only callable by governor when paused (safety measure).      Intended to be called via timelock for operational safety.

removeValidator(address).details: Enforces MIN_VALIDATORS to prevent centralization attacks.

setGovernor(address).details: New governor must call acceptGovernor() to complete the transfer.

setThreshold(uint256).details: Enforces BFT minimum of ceil(2n/3) when enough validators exist.

acceptGovernor().notice: Accept governor role. Only callable by pendingGovernor.

addValidator(address).notice: Add a new validator to the set.

claimWithdrawal(bytes20,address,uint256,.notice: Claim withdrawal on Arbitrum with validator signatures.

deposit(bytes20,uint256).notice: Deposit UDAG for bridging to native chain.

emergencyWithdrawERC20(address,address,u.notice: Emergency withdrawal of stuck ERC20 tokens.

emergencyWithdrawETH(address).notice: Emergency withdrawal of native ETH (if any).

getMessageHash(bytes20,address,uint256,u.notice: Public view function for off-chain signature generation.

migrateToNewBridge(address,uint256).notice: Migrate escrowed UDAG to a new bridge contract.

removeValidator(address).notice: Remove a validator from the set.
